mapper.select: SELECT A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_SJ, A.QUSTNR_PURPS, A.QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE) END QUSTNR_BGNDE, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE) END QUSTNR_ENDDE, A.QUSTNR_TRGET, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID, (SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID) QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId}

SELECT A.QESTNR_ID qestnrId, A.QUSTNR_SJ qestnrSj, A.QUSTNR_PURPS qestnrPurps, A.QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN qestnrWritngGuidanceCn, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE) END qestnrBeginDe, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE) END qestnrEndDe, A.QUSTNR_TRGET qestnrTrget, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, (SELECT USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) FRST_REGISTER_NM, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_SJ LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND FRST_REGISTER_ID IN (SELECT ESNTL_ID FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%') )
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_SJ LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND FRST_REGISTER_ID IN (SELECT ESNTL_ID FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%') )
SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_QESTNR_INFO SET QUSTNR_SJ=#{qestnrSj}, QUSTNR_PURPS=#{qestnrPurps}, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID=#{qestnrTmplatId}, QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN=#{qestnrWritngGuidanceCn}, QUSTNR_BGNDE=REPLACE(#{qestnrBeginDe},'-',''), QUSTNR_TRGET=#{qestnrTrget}, QUSTNR_ENDDE=REPLACE(#{qestnrEndDe},'-',''), LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = now(), LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_SJ qestnrSj, A.QUSTNR_PURPS qestnrPurps, A.QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN qestnrWritngGuidanceCn, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE) END QESTNR_BEGIN_DE, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE) END QESTNR_END_DE, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QUSTNR_TRGET qestnrTrget, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, (SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID) QESTNR_TMPLAT_TY FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_QESTNR_INFO ( QESTNR_ID, QUSTNR_SJ, QUSTNR_PURPS, QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN, QUSTNR_BGNDE, QUSTNR_ENDDE, QUSTNR_TRGET, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID )VALUES( #{qestnrId}, #{qestnrSj}, #{qestnrPurps}, #{qestnrWritngGuidanceCn}, REPLACE(#{qestnrBeginDe},'-',''), REPLACE(#{qestnrEndDe},'-',''), #{qestnrTrget}, #{qestnrTmplatId}, now(), #{frstRegisterId}, now(), #{lastUpdusrId} )
